Narsee Monjee Institute of Management St.official_note: Official NMIMS NPAT portal (fetched). Registration/info portal; program/campus-wise cutoff and merit lists are published on this portal (downloadable PDFs / step-5 'Merit List and Admission Status') rather than on a separate static cutoff page. No standalone public cutoff URL exists.

National Aptitude Test in Architecture.official_note: Official Council of Architecture NATA site. Qualifying cutoff (70/200) and scorecards are declared here after results; no separate static cutoff page — admission cutoffs are college-specific (NATA only sets the qualifying threshold).

National Council for Hotel Management Jo.official_note: Official NCHMCT eCounselling OR-CR page (fetched). Lists opening/closing rank reports for B.Sc (HHA) and M.Sc (HA), 2021–2026, with per-year download links. Specific cutoff page — better than the homepage.

National Council for Hotel Management an.official_note: Same exam (NCHMCT JEE). Official NCHMCT eCounselling OR-CR page (fetched) with year-wise opening/closing rank reports for B.Sc (HHA) and M.Sc (HA).

National Eligibility cum Entrance Test U.official_note: Official MCC UG Medical Counselling page (fetched). Hosts NEET-UG AIQ seat-allotment results, seat matrix and round-wise closing-rank reports. More specific than mcc.nic.in homepage. (NEET qualifying cutoffs are by NTA; admission closing ranks come from MCC counselling.)

National Entrance Screening Test.official_note: Official NEST exam site. Results, scorecard and category-wise cutoffs (MAP/SMAS) are released here; admission merit lists are maintained by the respective institutes (NISER Bhubaneswar / UM-DAE CEBS Mumbai). No separate static cutoff URL.

National Institute of Design Design Apti.official_note: Official NID Ahmedabad admissions portal (fetched). Links to B.Des/M.Des DAT Mains results and round-wise seat allotment; cutoffs are realised through seat-allotment rounds (incl. Toy & Game Design) rather than a standalone static cutoff page.
